holdings.infoBox: PSET is an equity ETF with a total of 73 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 6.71%, Apple at 5.69%, Microsoft at 3.49%, Alphabet at 3.25%, and Applied Materials at 2.61%.

overview.description: The Principal Quality ETF (PSET) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund utilizes a proprietary quantitative model to actively invest in large- and mid-cap companies that are perceived to exhibit higher quality, growth potential, and pricing power. PSET was launched on Mar 21, 2016 and is issued by Principal.
